overall.description: Cinematic game footage from a Western-themed open world game depicting a character walking through a rural farmstead at dawn, crossing open fields, and approaching a group of people gathered under a massive oak tree on a grassy hill, who then disperse as the camera draws near.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins within a rustic farmstead and gradually opens up into a wide, grassy landscape. It begins by navigating a dirt path past wooden barns, a smoking chimney, and a parked wagon. As the camera leaves the farmstead behind, the scene expands into open grassland with scattered trees, moving steadily across the field toward a distant elevation. The view then shifts upward toward a grassy hill topped with a massive oak tree, where a group of people stands silhouetted against the bright sky on a wooden platform. Finally, the camera arrives beneath the sprawling branches of the tree as the gathered crowd disperses and walks away, leaving the platform empty.
